creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
How to reproduce:
1. Open 'My Bugs'.
2. Sort list by 'Changed' field.
3. Close browser tab.
4. Open 'My Bugs'

Expected result:
List is sorted by 'Changed field'

Actual result:
List is sorted just by 'Assignee + Status' fields (default).

Affects:
Latest versions of Firefox on PC/Android.

I don't remember when it got broken exactly, but somewhat like 6 months ago it worked perfectly fine and saved sort order.
